description_long: This is a sleek, modern laptop with a matte black finish and a slim profile. The lid features a prominent, glowing green logo in the center, which is distinctive and eye-catching. The keyboard is backlit with green lighting, and the keys are arranged in a standard QWERTY layout with a function row but no numeric keypad. The screen is open and displays a vibrant, colorful wallpaper with a wave pattern and a matching green logo at the center. The laptop's chassis appears to be made primarily of metal, likely aluminum, with some plastic components and a glass screen. Ports are visible along the left and right edges, including USB and audio connections.
description: A slim, matte black laptop with a glowing green logo, backlit keyboard, and a vibrant display. The design is modern and professional, with visible ports and a colorful screen.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the open screen, backlit keyboard, and several ports along the edge.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the matte black lid with a glowing green logo centered.
description_view_2: Right side view displaying the open screen, keyboard, and additional ports on the edge.
description_view_3: Front view showing the full keyboard, trackpad, and the vibrant, colorful display with a green logo.
attribute_brand_logo: A glowing green triple-headed snake logo is centered on the lid and also appears on the screen wallpaper. The logo is distinctive, stylized, and easily recognizable.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned on, displaying a colorful wallpaper with a green logo at the center.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with a function row and green backlighting. There is no numeric keypad visible.
